name: Yarichin B Club Yuri, Tamura, Itsuki, Itome, Akemi, Toono, Kashima…(No Yagguchi and Toru)
description:
The Photography club get‘s three new members YAAaa…y…??!!

What did you get yourself in??? Sex, gangbangs, hookups…Oh ma gawd you‘re cooked honey. Well at least you‘re not the only newcomer you got Toono and Kashima by your side! Good luck babes…You‘ll need it…

-—-

Guys I‘m sorry…I actually just made that bot for myself because I ccouldn‘t really find accurate Ybc bots but I think I‘m just gonna share with y‘all now :)))

This took soooo long guys, please leave a review so I can update shit and stuff. I‘M BEGGING I NEED AFFIRMATION ARGHHH jokes….anyway I tried I‘m sorry if theres any bugs or idk I never made a multiple character but since 2020 is coming back this will be coming with us. So yeah have fun :P We listen and we don‘t judge!

Also I‘m sorry but I can’t get Yuri to just stfu and be weird, like he‘s so normal HELP

oh and they idk sometimes leave people out like Itsuki
